name: geo_register_pluggin
summary: Registers a scene to real-world GPS coordinates using EXIF, a similarity transform file, or an image positions CSV.
description: Solves a similarity transform (scale · R · t) that maps scene-space positions to ECEF (Earth-Centered Earth-Fixed / WGS-84) coordinates. Supports three input modes: automatic GPS extraction from image EXIF tags, loading a pre-computed similarity JSON, or loading an image positions CSV. Once registered, clicking any point on the model returns its latitude, longitude, and altitude.
author: dozeri
